find.match_belief: You learn by shipping. Every player's unexpected choice rewrites your assumptions faster than any meeting could.

profile.belief: Touch changes everything. A working jacket teaches you more than a hundred concept sketches ever will.
profile.working_on: Prototyping responsive fabrics that sync haptic feedback between people wearing them

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a deep desire to bridge human connection through tactile experiences, transforming how people engage and learn together.
